ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "ok", message: "MCP server is reachable" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { accountId: attributes.uriParams.accountId, sourceSystem: attributes.headers."source-system" default "MCP-Client", targetSystem: attributes.headers."target-system" default "Salesforce", correlationId: attributes.headers."x-correlation-id" default uuid(), authToken: attributes.headers."authtoken" default "", authorization: attributes.headers."authorization" default "" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { accountId: attributes.uriParams.accountId, sourceSystem: attributes.headers."source-system" default "MCP-Client", targetSystem: attributes.headers."target-system" default "Salesforce", correlationId: attributes.headers."x-correlation-id" default uuid(), authToken: attributes.headers."authtoken" default "", authorization: attributes.headers."authorization" default "", payplan: payload.payplan }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { accountId: attributes.uriParams.accountId, sourceSystem: attributes.headers."source-system" default "MCP-Client", targetSystem: attributes.headers."target-system" default "Salesforce", correlationId: attributes.headers."x-correlation-id" default uuid(), authToken: attributes.headers."authtoken" default "", authorization: attributes.headers."authorization" default "" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { accountId: attributes.uriParams.accountId, sourceSystem: attributes.headers."source-system" default "MCP-Client", targetSystem: attributes.headers."target-system" default "Salesforce", correlationId: attributes.headers."x-correlation-id" default uuid(), authToken: attributes.headers."authtoken" default "", authorization: attributes.headers."authorization" default "", newBudgetDate: attributes.queryParams."new-budget-date" default "", defaultFlag: attributes.queryParams."default-flag" default "RCBUD", recommendBudgetSwitch: (attributes.queryParams."recommend-budget-switch" default "true") as Boolean, budgetPlan: attributes.queryParams."budget-plan" default "BPP" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { accountId: attributes.uriParams.accountId, sourceSystem: attributes.headers."source-system" default "MCP-Client", targetSystem: attributes.headers."target-system" default "Salesforce", correlationId: attributes.headers."x-correlation-id" default uuid(), authToken: attributes.headers."authtoken" default "", authorization: attributes.headers."authorization" default "", addbudget: payload.addbudget }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { accountId: attributes.uriParams.accountId, sourceSystem: attributes.headers."source-system" default "MCP-Client", targetSystem: attributes.headers."target-system" default "Salesforce", correlationId: attributes.headers."x-correlation-id" default uuid(), authToken: attributes.headers."authtoken" default "", authorization: attributes.headers."authorization" default "", cancelbudget: payload.cancelbudget }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { accountId: attributes.uriParams.accountId, sourceSystem: attributes.headers."source-system" default "MCP-Client", targetSystem: attributes.headers."target-system" default "Salesforce", correlationId: attributes.headers."x-correlation-id" default uuid(), authToken: attributes.headers."authtoken" default "", authorization: attributes.headers."authorization" default "" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { payplanId: attributes.uriParams.payplanId, sourceSystem: attributes.headers."source-system" default "MCP-Client", targetSystem: attributes.headers."target-system" default "Salesforce", correlationId: attributes.headers."x-correlation-id" default uuid(), authToken: attributes.headers."authtoken" default "", authorization: attributes.headers."authorization" default "", iscancel: payload.iscancel default "", payplancancelreasondescription: payload.payplancancelreasondescription default "" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { accountId: attributes.uriParams.accountId, sourceSystem: attributes.headers."source-system" default "MCP-Client", targetSystem: attributes.headers."target-system" default "Salesforce", correlationId: attributes.headers."x-correlation-id" default uuid(), authToken: attributes.headers."authtoken" default "", authorization: attributes.headers."authorization" default "", (goodFaithPaymentDate: attributes.queryParams."goodFaithPaymentDate") if attributes.queryParams."goodFaithPaymentDate"?, (goodFaithPaymentAmount: attributes.queryParams."goodFaithPaymentAmount") if attributes.queryParams."goodFaithPaymentAmount"?, (numInstallments: attributes.queryParams."numInstallments") if attributes.queryParams."numInstallments"?, (overrideType: attributes.queryParams."overrideType") if attributes.queryParams."overrideType"? }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload
